title: Blurbattle
description: a simple plugin for pvp duels. it uses the multiverse-core plugin to have a seperate world for duels. this plugin is perfect for smp's and other small servers.
body: # about blurbattle is a simple plugin for pvp duels. it uses the multiverse-core plugin to have a seperate world for duels. this plugin is perfect for smp's and other small servers. # usage ``` /blurbattle [player] /blurbattle confirm /blurbattle cancel ``` # permissions blurbattle.battle.command
